import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut tokens: List<String> = []
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if is_ws(b)
        if not string.is_empty(cur)
          tokens = tokens.push(cur)
          cur = ""
        end
      else
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    tokens = tokens.push(cur)
    cur = ""
  end

  let a_opt = tokens.get(0)
  let b_opt = tokens.get(1)
  let s_opt = tokens.get(2)

  mut a = 0
  match a_opt
  when Some(t)
    match string.parse_int(t)
    when Some(v)
      a = v
    when None
      panic("invalid A")
    end
  when None
    panic("missing A")
  end

  mut bend = 0
  match b_opt
  when Some(t)
    match string.parse_int(t)
    when Some(v)
      bend = v
    when None
      panic("invalid B")
    end
  when None
    panic("missing B")
  end

  mut s = 0
  match s_opt
  when Some(t)
    match string.parse_int(t)
    when Some(v)
      s = v
    when None
      panic("invalid S")
    end
  when None
    panic("missing S")
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut x = a
  mut first = true
  while x < bend
    if first
      out = "#{x}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
    x = x + s
  end
  println(out)
end
